atom_a.text: Sparse mixture-of-experts routing activates only a few expert subnetworks per token, so the router gates compute toward the inputs each expert specializes in.

atom_b.text: In developmental biology, regulatory gene networks selectively activate developmental modules, so a single genome induces many distinct body plans depending on which modules switch on.

joint_topic: Genome-Style Regulatory Routing for Mixture-of-Experts Models
mechanism: A regulatory router reads task-context signals and selectively activates a subset of expert modules, which routes computation to specialized subnetworks and thereby induces distinct emergent sub-models from one shared set of parameters.
primary_quote: a single genome induces many distinct body plans depending on which modules switch on

atom_a.text: Test-time training updates a small inner model on each input sequence, so the network adapts its own weights during inference rather than only at train time.

atom_b.text: Evo-devo competency architectures treat cells as agents that solve morphogenetic problems, transforming local errors into coherent global anatomy.

joint_topic: Competency-Driven Test-Time Training as Morphogenetic Weight Adaptation
mechanism: Local prediction errors at each inference step induce small per-agent inner-model weight updates that transform local errors into corrective signals, and these distributed updates produce a coherent global output, mirroring how competent cells regulate morphogenesis toward a target anatomy.
primary_quote: the network adapts its own weights during inference rather than only at train time

atom_a.text: Basically, you know, AI is gonna be, like, really big and obviously change everything, I mean, sort of.

atom_b.text: Right? Like, the models just kind of get better over time, you know, it's wild, okay so.

joint_topic: Compute-Driven Capability Scaling as General-Purpose Transformation
mechanism: Increasing training scale (compute, data, parameters) induces emergent capability improvements that transform model behavior across generations, which in turn produces broad downstream task gains that drive economy-wide adoption effects.
primary_quote: the models just kind of get better over time
